title: Chapter 91
content:
Chapter 91: Chapter 91: The Feast of the Senses

The heavy, perfumed steam of the Lotus Spring Room clung to Kai’s skin like a second layer of clothing, but it was nothing compared to the suffocating, intoxicating heat of the women surrounding him.

Su Mei stood just outside the tight circle of noblewomen, her arms crossed beneath her own massive, crimson-wrapped breasts. A dark, territorial spark flashed in her eyes as she watched the rich ladies paw at the boy who had just completely wrecked her inside a carriage. Yet, she was a businesswoman first. She knew the gold this would bring to the Pavilion.

She offered Kai a slow, wicked smile that sent a shiver straight to his core.

"Don’t disappoint them, Kai," Su Mei purred, her sultry voice cutting through the giggles of the harem. "Show my esteemed guests exactly how...

capable you are. Remember your training."

"I... I will try my absolute best, Aunty Su Mei," Kai stammered, bowing his head slightly to hide the predatory smirk threatening to break through his flushed, innocent facade.

The moment Su Mei stepped back, the hungry lionesses completely closed in.

They were a sea of translucent silk, heavy breasts, and flushed, sweating skin. The sheer robes they wore left absolutely nothing to the imagination. Dark areolas, stiff nipples, and the dark shadows of their shaved pussies were proudly displayed under the guise of ’bathhouse attire.’

"Look at him," cooed a beautiful, slender woman with incredibly wide hips, trailing a wet, manicured finger down Kai’s muscular forearm. "His skin is so hot. Are you burning up, little Kai?"

"His muscles are like carved stone," another woman giggled, boldly pressing her soft, wet palm flat against his chest. She leaned in, her massive breasts completely squishing against his Academy uniform. "And his heart is beating so fast! Oh, the poor thing is terrified!"

"P-please, my ladies," Kai breathed, taking a half-step back, only to bump directly into the soft, plush backside of another noblewoman. He gasped, his face turning a brilliant shade of crimson. "I... I am not used to this... to so much beauty all at once."

The women erupted into a chorus of delighted, sultry laughter. To them, he was the ultimate prize: a massive, incredibly well-built stallion who was completely intimidated by their bodies.

But inside his mind, it was an entirely different story.

"Oh, they are practically begging to be slaughtered, Master,"

Ahena’s dark, echoing voice vibrated in his brain.

The invisible Demoness was hovering right above the circle of women. She was completely naked, her glowing ruby skin radiating a phantom chill. She lazily draped her long, spiked tail around Kai’s neck like a collar, invisible to everyone but him.

"Look at the way they present their meat to you,"

Ahena whispered filthy provocations directly into his ear, her yellow eyes gleaming.

"They think they are playing with a puppy. Take them, Master. Bend them over these marble benches and snap their aristocratic spines with your cock."

Kai gritted his teeth, forcing the

Dragon’s Vitality raging in his blood to remain hidden behind his blushing mask. He needed an anchor before he lost control and fucked the entire room into a coma.

Madam Lin provided it.

The incredibly thick, aristocratic woman with the sheer purple robe stepped forward, parting the sea of women. Her robe had completely slipped off her shoulders, leaving her massive, pale breasts hanging freely in the humid air, the dark pink nipples fully erect from the chill of her own sweat.

"Alright, ladies, give the poor boy some room to breathe," Madam Lin ordered playfully, though her eyes were locked onto Kai with absolute, ravenous hunger. "He is here to work, not just to be looked at."

She turned around, presenting her broad, fleshy back to him. She walked over to a low marble bench situated right at the edge of the bubbling hot spring and sat down. She let her knees fall wide apart, her thick thighs spreading to offer a clear, shadowy view of her weeping center beneath the translucent purple silk.

"Come here, little Kai," Madam Lin commanded softly, looking at him over her fleshy shoulder. "My shoulders are dreadfully tense. Show me what those big, strong hands can do."

Kai swallowed hard, feigning a nervous gulp. "Y-yes, my lady."

He walked over to the bench. Every eye in the room was fixed on him.

He stood right behind her. Madam Lin was seated so low that the top of her head barely reached his stomach. As he looked down, he had a perfect, bird’s-eye view of her massive breasts resting heavily on her thighs, squished together by her posture to form a breathtaking canyon of cleavage.

Kai slowly raised his hands. They were trembling—not from fear, but from the immense effort it took to hold back his feral strength.

He placed his large, calloused palms gently onto her bare, pale shoulders.

"Ah..." Madam Lin let out a soft, involuntary gasp the moment his skin touched hers.

Her flesh was incredibly soft, yielding perfectly under his touch. Kai didn’t activate the

Hands of Lecher fully—that would break her mind entirely in front of an audience—but he let just a tiny fraction of the magical, stimulating heat seep into his fingertips.

He began to knead the thick muscles at the base of her neck.

"Oh... oh heavens above," Madam Lin moaned loudly, her head falling back instantly. She didn’t care who was watching; the sensation was too divine. "That is... that is incredible. Your hands... they are so warm, Kai."

"I... I am glad it pleases you, my lady," Kai stuttered, his face burning red as she leaned her head back, the back of her skull accidentally brushing right against the incredibly hard, thick bulge straining against the zipper of his trousers.

The other women watched the display like starving wolves. The eroticism of the scene—this towering, muscular boy with his dark hands working the pale, naked flesh of the older noblewoman—was driving the temperature in the room to a boiling point.

They couldn’t just stand back.

Lady Feng, the woman with the transparent white robe, sauntered over. She didn’t speak. She just knelt on the marble floor right next to Kai’s leg. She reached out and placed her soft, wet hand directly onto his muscular thigh.

Kai gasped, his entire body jolting. "My lady?!"

"Shh," Lady Feng whispered, looking up at him with dark, lust-filled eyes. She slowly dragged her hand up his thigh, inching agonizingly close to his crotch. "You just keep massaging Lin’s shoulders, Kai. Don’t mind me. I just want to feel how tense your muscles are while you work."

Another woman stepped up in front of Madam Lin. She leaned over, placing her hands on Kai’s hips from the side, effectively trapping him between three half-naked women.

"He’s trembling," the woman whispered, giggling as she felt the hard muscles of his abdomen twitching. "And he is so incredibly hot to the touch."

"He’s getting hard," Lady Feng noted with wicked delight, her fingers grazing the very edge of his swelling erection through his trousers. She looked up at him, her lips parting. "Are we making you uncomfortable, Kai?"

Kai squeezed his eyes shut, shaking his head frantically as he continued to knead Madam Lin’s moaning, writhing body.

"N-no, my ladies... please..." Kai breathed, his voice cracking perfectly to sound like a boy pushed to the absolute edge of his sanity. "It’s... it’s just a natural reaction. I can’t help it! There is so much beauty... and the robes are so thin... I am trying my best to be respectful!"

The honest, desperate confession acted like an aphrodisiac bomb in the room.

Madam Lin let out a throaty, guttural moan, pushing her massive ass backward, grinding it deliberately against his thighs. Lady Feng stroked his leg harder, her breathing becoming shallow and ragged. The other women crowded closer, the heavy scent of their arousal completely overpowering the jasmine steam.

"Hold it in, Master,"

Ahena cackled telepathically, hovering upside down right in front of Kai’s face, her massive demonic breasts swaying just inches from his nose.

"Let them tease you. Let them get completely, disgustingly soaked. Make them beg you to ruin them."

Kai opened his eyes, looking down at the harem of noblewomen completely obsessed with his feigned innocence.
